## [03:03 - 06:05]

These are not examples of creative diversification. Examples will include things like different personas, concepts, angles and formats. So creating different ads that speak to different personas would mean appealing to different customer types and their unique lifestyles and needs. Creating different ads based on unique angles and concepts would include things like a problem and solution approach, focusing on different pain points, highlighting testimonials, or showcasing a product demo, all different approaches. And you could do all of these things while creating different ads that use different formats. They're diverse. So one ad might be a video, while another would be a static image link ad or a carousel.
